tweets.aiAnalysis: This performed exceptionally well despite being crisis communication because it triggered **urgency and fear-based engagement** — users needed to immediately understand the threat to their funds, creating compulsive sharing and bookmark-saving behavior. The specificity of the warning ("do not deposit") and direct call-to-action made it material information that users felt compelled to amplify despite the lack of concrete details.
